args.query: SELECT Id, FirstName, LastName, AccountId FROM Contact WHERE REPLACE(Id, '#', '') = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR' LIMIT 10;

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, FirstName, LastName, AccountId FROM Contact WHERE REPLACE(Id, '#', '') = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR' LIMIT 10;

args.query: SELECT Id, AccountId, Status, EffectiveDate, Pricebook2Id, OwnerId FROM "Order" WHERE REPLACE(AccountId, '#', '') = '001Wt00000PGXrNIAX' AND EffectiveDate BETWEEN '2021-06-01' AND '2021-06-30' ;

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, AccountId, Status, EffectiveDate, Pricebook2Id, OwnerId FROM "Order" WHERE REPLACE(AccountId, '#', '') = '001Wt00000PGXrNIAX' AND EffectiveDate BETWEEN '2021-06-01' AND '2021-06-30' ;

args.query: SELECT oi.Id as OrderItemId, oi.Product2Id, p.Name, p.Id as ProductId FROM OrderItem oi LEFT JOIN Product2 p ON REPLACE(oi.Product2Id, '#', '') = REPLACE(p.Id, '#', '') WHERE REPLACE(oi.OrderId, '#', '') = '801Wt00000PHRYWIA5';

exec_args.sql: SELECT oi.Id as OrderItemId, oi.Product2Id, p.Name, p.Id as ProductId FROM OrderItem oi LEFT JOIN Product2 p ON REPLACE(oi.Product2Id, '#', '') = REPLACE(p.Id, '#', '') WHERE REPLACE(oi.OrderId, '#', '') = '801Wt00000PHRYWIA5';
